name: Drizzle mock chain
description: vi.mock db with select/insert/update/delete/execute as vi.fn(). drizzleChain<T>(value) helper creates thenable mock with from/where/orderBy/innerJoin/set/limit chained. layers.list uses db.execute (raw SQL) not db.select

content: @vitest-environment node needed for all server-side tests (argon2 native bindings, fs streams). vi.resetAllMocks() in beforeEach clears mockReturnValueOnce queues AND implementations. vi.clearAllMocks() preserves mockImplementation.

description: inArray(column, ids) crashes Drizzle mock columns in tests
resolution: Use per-id eq() loop instead of inArray when mocking

content: Test contracts not implementations: stub check (trivial stub must fail), no magic literals (assert relationships), >=1 adversarial case per file (empty/max/malformed/concurrent), names as spec (rejects negative quantities not test_3)

Shared test-utils.ts at apps/web/src/__tests__/test-utils.ts: exports drizzleChain<T>() (union return type covers db.select/insert/update/delete — callers never cast), mockContext(overrides?) (authenticated tRPC context), publicContext() (unauthenticated), and DbExecuteResult type. All router tests import from here instead of duplicating helpers.

name: mockExecuteResult helper
description: mockExecuteResult<T>(rows) in test-utils.ts — wraps { rows } as unknown as DbExecuteResult, centralizing the single cast for raw SQL execute mocks. Used in annotations.test.ts and maps.test.ts.

name: shapefile-import-test-pattern
description: Shapefile import test follows KML/GPX pattern: mock shpjs default+parseShp via Object.assign(vi.fn(), { parseShp: mockParseShp }), mock fs/promises, mock db+queries. Tests: zip, raw .shp, multi-FC array, null geometry filter, empty, unsupported extension.

name: transform-test-coverage
description: geo-engine transform.ts fully tested (24 tests): normalizeCoordinates, looksLikeWGS84, toRadians, toDegrees, computeBbox. Edge cases: anti-meridian, poles, empty arrays, single point.

name: annotation-object-test-mocks
description: Annotation objects test pattern: mock db and changelog module, use drizzleChain for select, mockExecuteResult for raw SQL. Service tests mock requireMapAccess via db.select (access.ts queries maps table). tRPC adapter tests use annotationsRouter.createCaller(mockContext({userId})).

name: discriminated-union-test-state-machine
description: Replace N boolean/nullable state vars with a single InteractionState union type. Getters derive from union (e.g., featurePickMode = type === 'pickFeature' && \!picked). simulateFeatureSelect guards transitions — only from idle/featureSelected. Actions like drawActionAnnotate move data atomically between variants instead of clear-then-set (fixes race conditions).
